evals.prompt: Use my documentation-sync skill to check if the README and code comments match the current project structure
evals.expected_output: A structured report showing what's out of sync in README.md, with specific sections that need updating and suggested text changes for the user to review
evals.context: First sync after initial project setup, should identify any gaps between documented and actual structure

evals.prompt: Run documentation-sync to ensure our project description and capabilities are current
evals.expected_output: Suggestions for updating README descriptions of data processing pipeline, analysis capabilities, and any new module documentation
evals.context: Sync after adding features, captures capability changes

evals.prompt: Use documentation-sync to find what inline code comments are stale or misleading
evals.expected_output: Identified comments in src/ or models/ that contradict current behavior, with suggestions for updating them
evals.context: Identifies documentation debt in code itself
